actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 in scene is Fire (m_Script guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) attached to Fire-Wrapper - L - 1 - 5. Serialized config matches Fire.cs fields: debug=0, isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, maxNeighborDistance=4, downMultiplier=2, maxHitInterval=2, totalHitTime=5, onNeighborsThreshold=2, minNeighborDownDistance=3, mainEffectGo fileID 1849464941111748095. Object has BoxCollider (Trigger-eligible) and no Rigidbody. Fire implements IWaterInteractable and exposes WaterHit(Vector3) which must be invoked repeatedly while the fire is burning (isOn=true) so that currentHitInterval stays < maxHitInterval (2s) and currentHitTime >= totalHitTime (5s). Expected: fire turns off (isOn=false), particle stops via UpdateFireState(true), neighbors notified, FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1) called. Note: Fire has no public parameterless methods to call via Trigger; WaterHit requires a parameter and must be invoked by the water system or a bound UnityEvent (m_Calls) — none are present in this scene data.
